policy.core_rule: Contact forms are not part of the core autonomous workflow. Prefer email, RSS, public editorial contact, direct submission email, or inbound data assets.

form_decisions.no_anti_bot: HOLD — evaluate legal/safety before any action
form_decisions.safe_form_confirmed: SAFE_FORM — only if legally allowed and no restrictions bypassed

preferred_contact_methods: RSS feed monitoring for journalist requests
blocked_channels: write for us pages asking payment
